title: Add logo and verify/add all PM Surya Ghar process phases content

requirements.summary: Replace company logo with regenerated image matching uploaded screenshot
acceptanceCriteria: Logo image matches the uploaded screenshot: dark navy background, gold gradient lightning bolt through a sun/crescent symbol
Logo is displayed in the Header component in the same position as the existing logo
Logo image is saved as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/

file_operations.description: Update the logo image src to reference the generated logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/bhagyalaxmi-logo.dim_400x400.png. Verify the image renders correctly in the header with appropriate alt text.

requirements.summary: Verify or add Phase 1 – Registration & Feasibility section with all four registration steps
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Phase 1 – Registration & Feasibility' section exists on the page
All four sub-steps (Visit Portal, Register, Enter Details, Feasibility Approval with 7–15 day timeline) are displayed
pmsuryaghar.gov.in is referenced as the official portal URL

file_operations.description: Add or verify translation keys for Phase 1 content including: phase1Title ('Phase 1 – Registration & Feasibility'), phase1Steps array containing (1) Visit Portal at pmsuryaghar.gov.in, (2) Register with Odisha/DISCOM selection, (3) Enter Consumer Number and Mobile, (4) Submit technical details for Feasibility Approval within 7–15 days. Include translations for English, Hindi, and Odia.

Verify that Phase 1 content is rendered from translation keys. If missing, add a dedicated Phase 1 section displaying all four steps with the portal URL pmsuryaghar.gov.in as a clickable link. Use consistent styling with existing scheme sections and animate into view.

requirements.summary: Verify or add Phase 2 – Selecting BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION section with vendor selection steps
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Phase 2 – Selecting BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' section exists on the page
All five steps (Login, Vendor List, Filter, Selection, Agreement) are present and accurate
BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION is highlighted as the vendor to select

file_operations.description: Add or verify translation keys for Phase 2 content including: phase2Title ('Phase 2 – Selecting BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION'), phase2Steps array containing (1) Login using Consumer Number, (2) Navigate to 'Select Registered Vendor', (3) Filter by State (Odisha) and District, (4) Search and select BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION, (5) Sign online agreement (Model Draft). Include translations for all three languages with emphasis on vendor name.

Verify that Phase 2 content is rendered from translation keys. If missing, add a dedicated Phase 2 section displaying all five vendor selection steps with visual emphasis on BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION. Use consistent styling and animation.

requirements.summary: Verify or add Phase 3 – Installation & Net-Metering section with installation and meter application steps
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Phase 3 – Installation & Net-Metering' section exists on the page
All three steps (Installation, Completion Report, Net-Metering application) are displayed
MNRE standards and bi-directional meter are mentioned

file_operations.description: Add or verify translation keys for Phase 3 content including: phase3Title ('Phase 3 – Installation & Net-Metering'), phase3Steps array containing (1) Bhagyalaxmi Construction installs per MNRE standards, (2) Vendor submits completion report with photos, (3) Apply for Net-Meter via portal for bi-directional meter installation by DISCOM. Include translations for all three languages.

Verify that Phase 3 content is rendered from translation keys. If missing, add a dedicated Phase 3 section displaying all three installation steps with MNRE standards and bi-directional meter terminology. Use consistent styling and animation.

requirements.summary: Verify or add Phase 4 – Subsidy Disbursement section with payment timeline and amount
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Phase 4 – Subsidy Disbursement' section exists on the page
All three steps (Commissioning Certificate, Bank Details upload, Payment) are present
Subsidy amount ₹1,38,000 and 30 working days timeline are explicitly mentioned

file_operations.description: Add or verify translation keys for Phase 4 content including: phase4Title ('Phase 4 – Subsidy Disbursement'), phase4Steps array containing (1) Commissioning Certificate issued by DISCOM after net-meter functional, (2) Submit bank details via cancelled cheque photo, (3) Subsidy of ₹1,38,000 credited within 30 working days. Include exact rupee amount and timeline in all three languages.

Verify that Phase 4 content is rendered from translation keys. If missing, add a dedicated Phase 4 section displaying all three disbursement steps with prominent display of ₹1,38,000 subsidy amount and 30 working days timeline. Use consistent styling and animation.

requirements.summary: Verify or add 'Why Choose Bhagyalaxmi Construction?' section with three differentiators
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Why Choose Bhagyalaxmi Construction?' section is present on the page
All three differentiators (Registered Vendor, Technical Expertise, Hassle-Free) are listed with their descriptions

file_operations.description: Add or verify translation keys for Why Choose section including: whyChooseTitle ('Why Choose Bhagyalaxmi Construction?'), whyChoosePoints array containing (1) Registered Vendor – Officially empaneled in Odisha, (2) Technical Expertise – High-quality mounting and wiring, (3) Hassle-Free – Assistance with portal uploads and documentation. Include translations for all three languages.

Verify that Why Choose Bhagyalaxmi Construction content is rendered. If missing or incomplete, add a dedicated section with all three differentiator points displayed as cards or list items with icons. Use navy/gold/teal accent colors consistent with existing design and animate into view.

requirements.summary: Verify or add Contact & Next Steps section with official portal URL
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Contact & Next Steps' section exists on the page
pmsuryaghar.gov.in is displayed as a clickable link
Section encourages users to take next steps

file_operations.description: Add or verify translation keys for Contact & Next Steps section including: contactNextStepsTitle ('Contact & Next Steps'), officialWebsiteLabel ('Official Website'), portalUrl ('pmsuryaghar.gov.in'), and a call-to-action message encouraging users to proceed. Include translations for all three languages.

Verify that Contact & Next Steps section exists with pmsuryaghar.gov.in as a clickable external link. If missing, add the section at the end of SchemeInfo with the official portal URL prominently displayed and a CTA encouraging users to begin registration. Use consistent styling with navy background and gold accents.
